Steps to Reproduce

<!-- If this is a code issue, provide numbered steps to reproduce -->
1. Copy the code from section "..."
2. Create a new extension project with the manifest shown
3. Load the extension in Chrome
4. See the error in the console / popup / background

Paste errors here

Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues to make sure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I verified the issue exists on the latest version of the article (main branch)
- [ ] I included the Chrome version and OS where I tested
